message:
🐛 Fix related projects to open in same tab and add footer controls (#719)

* 🐛 Fix related projects to open in same tab and add footer controls

- Remove target="_blank" from related project links so they open in
  the same tab instead of a new tab
- Move theme toggle and collapse buttons from SidebarFooter into
  RelatedProjects component for a more cohesive UI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix sidebar height recalculation when banner state changes

The sidebar height wasn't recalculating when the banner was dismissed,
causing the footer controls to be pushed off the viewport. Now properly
recalculates height when bannerDismissed changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🎨 Reduce banner font size and padding

- Reduced padding from py-3 to py-2
- Reduced font from text-sm/text-base to text-xs/text-sm
- Reduced close button icon from h-5 w-5 to h-4 w-4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Move RelatedProjects into scrollable area for banner adjustment

Move RelatedProjects inside the scrollable div so it scrolls with
the nav content. This ensures the footer controls are accessible
when the banner is active and reduces available viewport height.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Reduce RelatedProjects spacing when banner is active

Pass bannerActive prop to RelatedProjects and reduce padding/margins
when the banner is present to ensure the theme toggle stays visible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix RelatedProjects back to fixed position at bottom of sidebar

Revert to having RelatedProjects outside the scrollable area (shrink-0)
so it stays fixed at the bottom. The sidebar height calculation already
accounts for the banner, and bannerActive prop adjusts internal spacing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Auto-collapse Related Projects when banner is active

This ensures the theme toggle and collapse button remain visible
when the banner takes extra vertical space.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Revert "🐛 Auto-collapse Related Projects when banner is active"

This reverts commit 9c7dfdbcd6aa791f854ddf7160996db4b655996e.

* 🐛 Reduce RelatedProjects link spacing when banner is active

Makes project links more compact (py-0.5 vs py-1.5, no space-y gap)
when banner is active to ensure toggle stays in viewport.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
